Name: Retold Data Mapper
Tagline: Cross-beacon schema mapping and data sync — discover remote databeacons on the Ultravisor mesh, define field mappings, and execute batch syncs.
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-retold-data-mapper-filled-light">
				<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#e33cad"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-retold-data-mapper-filled-light)"><path d="M 48.00,12.00 L 79.18,30.00 L 79.18,66.00 L 48.00,84.00 L 16.82,66.00 L 16.82,30.00 Z" fill="#49b9ee"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="24" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">RDM</text>
	</svg>
